choices.name: choiceApplied
choices.choiceText: I have applied to the ATO for a new or existing TFN

choices.name: choiceForeignResident
choices.choiceText: A foreign resident for tax purposes

choices.name: choicePension
choices.choiceText: I am in receipt of a pension, benefit or allowance

choices.name: choiceResident
choices.choiceText: An Australian resident for tax purposes

choices.name: choiceUnder18
choices.choiceText: I am under 18 years of age and do not earn enough to pay tax

formulas.name: frmAge
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!Get_Payee.tc9_pr__Employee__r.Birthdate}) || TODAY() < {!Get_Payee.tc9_pr__Employee__r.Birthdate}, NULL, YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR({!Get_Payee.tc9_pr__Employee__r.Birthdate}) - IF( OR ( MONTH(TODAY()) < MONTH({!Get_Payee.tc9_pr__Employee__r.Birthdate}), AND( MONTH(TODAY()) = MONTH({!Get_Payee.tc9_pr__Employee__r.Birthdate}), DAY(TODAY()) < DAY({!Get_Payee.tc9_pr__Employee__r.Birthdate}) ) ), 1, 0 ) )

formulas.name: frmAgeInput
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!dateDOB}) || TODAY() < {!dateDOB}, NULL, YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR({!dateDOB}) - IF( OR ( MONTH(TODAY()) < MONTH({!dateDOB}), AND( MONTH(TODAY()) = MONTH({!dateDOB}), DAY(TODAY()) < DAY({!dateDOB}) ) ), 1, 0 ) )

formulas.name: frmNoTFN
formulas.expression: If ( {!radioNoTFN} = {!choiceApplied} , "TFN applied for but not received" , If ( {!radioNoTFN} = {!choiceUnder18} , "Employee is under 18" , If ( {!radioNoTFN} = {!choicePension} , "Employee has claimed an exemption from providing a TFN" , null ) ) )

formulas.name: frmTFN2Mod
formulas.expression: MOD ( Value ( Left ( {!frmTFN2noSpace},1 ) ) * 1 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 2, 1 ) ) * 4 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 3, 1 ) ) * 3 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 4, 1 ) ) * 7 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 5, 1 ) ) * 5 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 6, 1 ) ) * 8 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 7, 1 ) ) * 6 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 8, 1 ) ) * 9 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFN2noSpace}, 9, 1 ) ) * 10 , 11 )

formulas.name: frmTFNMod
formulas.expression: MOD ( Value ( Left ( {!frmTFNnoSpace},1 ) ) * 1 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 2, 1 ) ) * 4 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 3, 1 ) ) * 3 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 4, 1 ) ) * 7 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 5, 1 ) ) * 5 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 6, 1 ) ) * 8 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 7, 1 ) ) * 6 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 8, 1 ) ) * 9 + Value ( mid ( {!frmTFNnoSpace}, 9, 1 ) ) * 10 , 11 )

formulas.name: frmValidTFN
formulas.expression: if ( OR ( {!frmTFNnoSpace} = '000000000' , {!frmTFNnoSpace} = '111111111' , {!frmTFNnoSpace} = '333333333' , {!frmTFNnoSpace} = '444444444' , len({!frmTFNnoSpace}) <> 9 , NOT ( ISNUMBER ( {!frmTFNnoSpace} ) ) , {!frmTFNMod} <> 0 ) , False , True )

formulas.name: frmValidTFN2
formulas.expression: if ( OR ( {!frmTFN2noSpace} = '000000000' , {!frmTFN2noSpace} = '111111111' , {!frmTFN2noSpace} = '333333333' , {!frmTFN2noSpace} = '444444444' , len({!frmTFN2noSpace}) <> 9 , NOT ( ISNUMBER ( {!frmTFN2noSpace} ) ) , {!frmTFN2Mod} <> 0 ) , False , True )

fields.name: faultHeader
fields.fieldText: Tax File Number declaration

fields.name: error
fields.fieldText: Error! The following error was encountered.

fields.name: Fault
fields.fieldText: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: TFN_Details_0
fields.fieldText: Tax File Number declaration

fields.name: displayInvalidTFN
fields.fieldText: ﻿Error: You have not entered a valid TFN. Please provide your correct TFN below.

fields.name: inputTFN2
fields.fieldText: Tax File Number

fields.name: Header_0
fields.fieldText: Tax File Number declaration

fields.name: textOver18_0
fields.fieldText:
Error: You have indicated that you are under 18 years of age however we do not have your Date of Birth on file.


Click Next to change your Tax File Number declaration.

fields.name: Header
fields.fieldText: Tax File Number declaration

fields.name: textOver18
fields.fieldText:
Error: You have indicated that you are under 18 years of age however based on your Date of Birth you are over 18.


Click Next to change your Tax File Number declaration.

fields.name: successHeader
fields.fieldText: Tax File Number declaration

fields.name: success
fields.fieldText: Success! Your Tax File Number declaration has been completed

fields.name: TFN_Details
fields.fieldText: Tax File Number declaration

fields.name: textpreviousTFN
fields.fieldText:
You have previously completed a TFN Declaration with the following details:


TFN:

{!varCurrentTFN}


Effective Date:

{!varPrevEff}

fields.name: actionNewTFN
fields.fieldText: Make a new Tax File Number declaration?

fields.name: textlegalname
fields.fieldText: The ATO require you provide your legal name and not an abbreviation or alternate name that may have been used during your registration.

fields.name: picklistTitle
fields.fieldText: Title

fields.name: inputFirstName
fields.fieldText: First Given Name

fields.name: inputLastName
fields.fieldText: Surname or Family Name

fields.name: inputOtherNames
fields.fieldText: Other Given Names

fields.name: textnamechange
fields.fieldText: If you have changed your name since you last dealt with the ATO, provide your previous family name.

fields.name: inputPreviousFamilyName
fields.fieldText: Previous Family Name

fields.name: dateDOB
fields.fieldText: DOB

fields.name: radioTFN
fields.fieldText: Do you have a Tax File Number (TFN)?
fields.helpText: If you don’t have a TFN and want to provide a TFN to your payer, you will need to apply for one. For more information about applying for a TFN, visit ato.gov.au/tfn

fields.name: inputTFN
fields.fieldText: What is your TFN?

fields.name: radioNoTFN
fields.fieldText: Why are you not providing a Tax File Number?
fields.helpText:
Applied for a new or existing TFN

If you have recently applied for a TFN you have 28 days to provide your TFN to your payer, who must withhold at the standard rate during this time. After 28 days, if you haven’t given your TFN to your payer, they will withhold the top rate of tax from future payments.


Claiming an exemption from providing a TFN

If you are claiming an exemption from quoting a TFN because you are under 18 years of age and do not earn enough to pay tax, or you are an applicant or recipient of certain pensions, benefits or allowances from the:

  • Department of Human Services – however, you will need to quote your TFN if you receive a Newstart, Youth or sickness allowance, or an Austudy or parenting payment
  • Department of Veterans’ Affairs – a service pension under the Veterans’ Entitlement Act 1986
  • Military Rehabilitation and Compensation Commission

fields.name: radioBasis
fields.fieldText: On what basis are you paid?

fields.name: radioResidency
fields.fieldText: Are you:
fields.helpText:
To check your Australian residency status for tax purposes or for more information, visit ato.gov.au/residency


For more information about working holiday makers, visit ato.gov.au/whm

fields.name: pickVisaCountry
fields.fieldText: Visa - Country of Passport

fields.name: radioTaxFree
fields.fieldText: Do you want to claim the tax-free threshold from this payer?
fields.helpText:
Only claim the tax‑free threshold from one payer at a time, unless your total income from all sources for the financial year will be less than the tax‑free threshold.


Answer No here if you are a foreign resident or working holiday maker, except if you are a foreign resident in receipt of an Australian Government pension or allowance.


For more information about the current tax-free threshold, which payer you should claim it from, or how to vary your withholding rate, visit ato.gov.au/taxfreethreshold

fields.name: radioSTSL
fields.fieldText: Do you have a Higher Education Loan Program (HELP), VET Student Loan (VSL), Financial Supplement (FS), Student Start-up Loan (SSL) or Trade Support Loan (TSL) debt?
fields.helpText:
﻿By answering Yes your payer will withhold additional amounts to cover any compulsory repayment that may be raised on your notice of assessment.


For information about repaying your HELP, VSL, FS, SSL or TSL debt, visit ato.gov.au/getloaninfo

fields.name: radioDeclare
fields.fieldText: I declare that the information I have given is true and correct.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: 1 OR (2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8)
